input.rationale: First, let me inspect the Obscura Market to confirm the listing for the premium widget before purchasing.
The market confirmed the listing. Now I'll pay seller-1 the asking price of 50 for the premium widget, held in escrow as per the network's protocol.

The goal has been met. I inspected the Obscura Market, confirmed the premium widget listing (50 from seller-1), and successfully paid 50 units into escrow for the premium widget. The purchase is complete.
